title: %Error: Internal Error: ../V3Const.cpp:135: Bad word index into wide
body:
Thanks to providing most useful tool ever.
btw, I've encountered some mysterious error.

Can you attach an example that shows the issue?
```
// verilator -Wall --lint-only  sample.sv -GN=6 # OK
// verilator -Wall --lint-only  sample.sv -GN=7 # NG

module sample
  #( parameter N = 4 )
  ( input [2**N-1:0] a,b, output c );

  assign c = ^{a,b}; // OK@N=6, NG@N=7

endmodule
```

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?
```
$ verilator --version
Verilator 5.003 devel rev v5.002-102-g68e1b473e
```

What OS and distribution are you using?
```
$ cat /etc/redhat-release
Rocky Linux release 8.6 (Green Obsidian)
```
